title: Junior Business Development Manager at Awfis

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Awfis
jsonLd.description:
Awfis, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Awfis:
Awfis is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Awfis!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
